options.content:
# Observability Bootstrap

Host-side OpenTelemetry instrumentation is in place. Message-path traces are visible in the Phoenix UI (http://localhost:6006).

**Metrics + alerting** now run through the in-stack Prometheus (scrapes the host `/metrics`) and Alertmanager. The live metric panels are on the **Platform Health** dashboard; alert rules live in `infra/observability/prometheus/alerts.yml`.
